generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorizedShadeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) element that controls motorized shades for adaptive lighting and thermal regulation, enabling bidirectional control signals from the Digital Twin to physical infrastructure."
]

instance ProgrammableLogicController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled programmable logic controller integrated within the BIM environment to execute runtime control logic such as adaptive lighting policies and environmental regulation."
]

instance AdjustableBlindController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator component for adjustable blinds that receives control signals from the Digital Twin to optimize natural light distribution and energy efficiency."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance CO2SensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy CO2 sensor network embedded in building infrastructure to monitor indoor air quality and trigger ventilation adjustments via the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmission
]

instance HumiditySensorArray : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Distributed humidity sensors collecting real-time environmental data for occupancy-based control systems and indoor comfort optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmission
]

instance PIRMotionDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Passive infrared motion detector providing occupancy status data for adaptive lighting and HVAC control systems."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmission
]

instance PowerMeterSystem : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building automation system power meters tracking energy consumption patterns for real-time energy optimization and predictive maintenance."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmission
]

instance VisualComfortSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network monitoring visual comfort parameters (lighting levels, glare) to enable adaptive lighting control systems like those in BOREALIS project."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VisualComfortDataTransmission
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance CO2DataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2SensorNetwork
]

instance HumidityDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensorArray
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PIRMotionDetector
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerMeterSystem
]

instance VisualComfortDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VisualComfortSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data serving as the foundation for all Digital Twin components and metadata extraction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMToRuntimeArtifactGenerator
]

instance RuntimeMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Embedded runtime metadata within BIM including sensor configurations, control policies, and device endpoint mappings for seamless physical-virtual integration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoMiddleware
]

instance EnergyPerformanceSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation model for energy optimization analyzing lighting and HVAC performance under various occupancy and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveLightingController
]

instance OccupancyBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model predicting occupancy patterns based on historical data and environmental factors for proactive system adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HVACAdaptiveController
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time CO2 concentration measurements transmitted from sensor network to enable ventilation control and indoor air quality management."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo IndoorAirQualityController
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental humidity measurements used for comfort optimization and energy-efficient climate control systems."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ClimateControlSystem
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status data from motion detectors enabling adaptive lighting and HVAC control based on actual presence."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveLightingController
]

instance EnergyConsumptionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Granular energy consumption metrics from power meters used for real-time monitoring, cost optimization, and predictive maintenance."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EnergyOptimizationService
]

instance VisualComfortData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual comfort metrics including lighting levels and glare measurements used for adaptive lighting system calibration."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VisualComfortDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LightingQualityController
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware providing telemetry and device management capabilities for bidirectional communication between physical sensors and Digital Twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService, DeviceManagementService
]

instance EclipseDittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto enabling bidirectional communication protocols between physical actuators and virtual Digital Twin representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlSignalDistributionService, DeviceStateSynchronization
]

instance BIMToRuntimeArtifactGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering tool automating the generation of runtime artifacts from BIM models to reduce manual intervention in Digital Twin deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDrivenDeploymentService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing interactive 3D monitoring and simulation capabilities for immersive Digital Twin visualization."
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService, SimulationEnvironment
]

instance OverallDigitalTwinEntanglementValidator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Validation framework implementing the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess fidelity between physical and virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables FidelityValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data transmission from physical sensors to Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataValidationInsight, DataConsistencyAction
]

instance DeviceManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing device registrations, configurations, and lifecycle operations within the Digital Twin ecosystem."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceHealthInsight, ConfigurationUpdateAction
]

instance ControlSignalDistributionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service distributing control signals from Digital Twin to physical actuators through Eclipse Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlEffectivenessInsight, SignalValidationAction
]

instance DeviceStateSynchronization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service maintaining synchronization between physical device states and their virtual representations in the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:provides StateConsistencyInsight
]

instance AdaptiveLightingController : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing adaptive lighting policies using real-time occupancy and visual comfort data for energy optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingEnergySavingsInsight, ComfortOptimizationAction
]

instance HVACAdaptiveController : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service adjusting HVAC systems based on occupancy patterns and environmental data for optimal energy performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyInsight, OccupancyBasedControlAction
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service analyzing energy consumption data to identify optimization opportunities and implement cost-saving measures."
    DTDFVocab:provides CostSavingsInsight, DemandResponseAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive 3D visualization of building systems and Digital Twin components through Unreal Engine."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemVisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling predictive simulations of building performance under various scenarios for decision support."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformancePredictionInsight
]

instance ModelDrivenDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating the deployment of Digital Twin components from BIM models to runtime environments."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentValidationInsight
]

instance FidelityValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing ODTE metric to continuously validate and improve Digital Twin fidelity with physical assets."
    DTDFVocab:provides FidelityScoreInsight, ModelRefinementAction
]

instance IndoorAirQualityController : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing ventilation systems and indoor air quality based on CO2 and humidity data."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityInsight, VentilationAdjustmentAction
]

instance ClimateControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing climate control systems based on humidity and temperature data."
    DTDFVocab:provides ClimateComfortInsight, HVACAdjustmentAction
]

instance LightingQualityController : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing lighting quality based on visual comfort data and occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingQualityInsight, LightingAdjustmentAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance SensorDataValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results for incoming sensor data ensuring quality and consistency before processing."
]

instance DataConsistencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated action resolving data inconsistencies detected during validation processes."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeviceHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current health status of physical devices including operational status and potential failure indicators."
]

instance ConfigurationUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated configuration updates for devices based on operational requirements and system changes."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlEffectivenessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metrics evaluating the effectiveness of control signals sent to physical actuators."
]

instance SignalValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated validation and correction of control signals before transmission to physical components."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance StateConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of consistency between physical device states and their virtual representations."
]

instance LightingEnergySavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantified energy savings achieved through adaptive lighting control systems."
]

instance ComfortOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to lighting systems optimizing visual comfort based on occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of energy efficiency metrics across building systems identifying optimization opportunities."
]

instance OccupancyBasedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control adjustments based on real-time occupancy data for energy conservation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CostSavingsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected cost savings from energy optimization and operational efficiency improvements."
]

instance DemandResponseAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated implementation of demand response strategies during peak energy periods."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of building systems and their current operational states for immersive monitoring."
]

instance PerformancePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive performance metrics for building systems under various operational scenarios."
]

instance DeploymentValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results for Digital Twin deployment artifacts ensuring correct implementation from BIM models."
]

instance FidelityScoreInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) score measuring the fidelity between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated refinement of Digital Twin models based on validation results to improve accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AirQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of indoor air quality metrics based on CO2 and humidity levels."
]

instance VentilationAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to ventilation systems based on air quality data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ClimateComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of climate comfort metrics based on humidity and temperature data."
]

instance HVACAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to HVAC systems based on climate data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingQualityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of lighting quality metrics based on visual comfort data."
]

instance LightingAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to lighting systems based on visual comfort data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Environment/Component
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorizedShadeActuator, ProgrammableLogicController, CO2SensorNetwork,
                 HumiditySensorArray, PIRMotionDetector, PowerMeterSystem,
                 VisualComfortSensor, BuildingInformationModel
]

instance DigitalTwinCoreEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains EclipseHonoMiddleware, EclipseDittoMiddleware, RuntimeMetadataModel,
                 EnergyPerformanceSimulationModel, OccupancyBehaviorModel
]

instance ControlSystemComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Integrated control system combining sensing, processing, and actuation components for building automation."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinCoreEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT generates outputs to influence the physical system, including:
  - **Control signals** (e.g., adjusting lighting levels, HVAC setpoints, or motorized window positions) sent back to actuators via middleware.
  - **Dynamic reconfiguration** of control logic (e.g., adaptive lighting policies) based on runtime data.
  - **Feedback loops** where the DT processes virtual simulations and adjusts physical systems accordingly."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates at **real-time granularity** for continuous synchronization between physical and virtual systems, with **sub-second to millisecond latency** for critical control loops (e.g., HVAC adjustments). The framework supports **hourly/daily aggregation** for broader analytics and lifecycle optimization, aligning with the **life cycle management** requirements of AECO. The **BOREALIS project** emphasizes **iterative optimization** over time, using post-occupancy data to refine control policies dynamically. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** evaluates the fidelity of synchronization at runtime."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular platform**:
  - **BIM-centric core** for semantic integration and device modeling.
  - **Middleware layer** (Hono/Ditto) for real-time data synchronization.
  - **Service layer** for custom analytics, visualization, and control.
  - **Extension points** for integrating third-party services (e.g., AI/ML models, IoT gateways)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple lifecycle stages**:
  - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with device metadata and control logic.
  - **Construction phase**: Physical sensors/actuators are integrated and configured.
  - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, optimization, and adaptive control occur.
  - **Maintenance/Refurbishment phase**: DTs support performance analysis and retrofitting decisions.
  The DT represents the physical asset **as designed (ideal)**, **as manufactured**, and **as operated** through continuous synchronization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Model validation** (e.g., checking BIM metadata consistency).
  - **ODTE metric** to quantify alignment between PT and DT.
  - **Uncertainty handling** via sensor calibration and data normalization.
  - **Verification mechanisms** (e.g., testing control logic in simulation before deployment)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto** for **real-time data exchange**, leveraging **standardized middleware protocols** (e.g., **MQTT** for lightweight messaging, though not explicitly named in the text). The framework supports **bidirectional communication** between physical sensors/actuators and the virtual twin, enabling **low-latency synchronization**. Performance claims include **scalability for heterogeneous infrastructure systems** and **interoperability with AECO-specific tools** (e.g., BIM, BAS). Specific details like **RESTful APIs** or **high-throughput guarantees** are not explicitly mentioned."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed via a **model-driven framework** that automates the generation of runtime artifacts from BIM models. Hosting infrastructure is abstracted, with middleware (Hono/Ditto) managing device connectivity. The framework leverages **Unreal Engine** for visualization but does not specify cloud/edge deployment (e.g., Kubernetes, containerization). Deployment is **service-oriented**, allowing modular scaling of components (e.g., analytics, visualization)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework supports **interoperability across heterogeneous systems** through standardized middleware (Hono/Ditto) and BIM-based semantics. While specific external integrations (e.g., ERP, facility management platforms) are not detailed, the architecture enables **cross-system communication** via RESTful APIs and MQTT protocols. The focus is on **AECO-specific standards** (e.g., BIM) rather than broader enterprise integration."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, particularly **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the **semantic backbone** for unified asset representation. The framework leverages **domain-specific modeling languages** and **metamodels** to standardize BIM semantics, ensuring **interoperability** across heterogeneous systems. While **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** are not explicitly named, the text emphasizes **BIM’s role as the standard solution** in the construction industry. **Middleware standards** (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto) further enable **scalable, interoperable DT deployments**."
]
